name: Data Lake Architecture
diagramSvg:
<svg width="900" height="600" viewBox="0 0 900 600" font-family="system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <marker id="arr" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="10" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1B3A6B"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Title Bar -->
  <rect width="900" height="52" fill="#1B3A6B"/>
  <text x="450" y="32" text-anchor="middle" fill="#fff" font-size="18" font-weight="700">Data Lake Architecture</text>
  <text x="450" y="47" text-anchor="middle" fill="#93b4d8" font-size="11">Data & Storage · Tier 2 — Logical</text>

  <!-- Background -->
  <rect y="52" width="900" height="548" fill="#EAF1FB"/>

  <!-- Zone Labels -->
  <!-- Ingestion Zone -->
  <rect x="30" y="80" width="160" height="480" rx="8" fill="#E8F5F0" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="6,3"/>
  <text x="110" y="100" text-anchor="middle" fill="#0F6E56" font-size="12" font-weight="700">Ingestion</text>

  <!-- Raw Zone -->
  <rect x="210" y="80" width="160" height="480" rx="8" fill="#EAF1FB" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="6,3"/>
  <text x="290" y="100" text-anchor="middle" fill="#1B3A6B" font-size="12" font-weight="700">Raw Zone</text>

  <!-- Curated Zone -->
  <rect x="390" y="80" width="160" height="480" rx="8" fill="#E8F5F0" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="6,3"/>
  <text x="470" y="100" text-anchor="middle" fill="#0F6E56" font-size="12" font-weight="700">Curated Zone</text>

  <!-- Consumption Zone -->
  <rect x="570" y="80" width="160" height="480" rx="8" fill="#EAF1FB" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="6,3"/>
  <text x="650" y="100" text-anchor="middle" fill="#1B3A6B" font-size="12" font-weight="700">Consumption</text>

  <!-- Governance (right side) -->
  <rect x="750" y="80" width="130" height="480" rx="8" fill="#fff8ec" stroke="#BA7517" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="6,3"/>
  <text x="815" y="100" text-anchor="middle" fill="#BA7517" font-size="12" font-weight="700">Governance</text>

  <!-- Ingestion Sources -->
  <rect x="42" y="140" width="136" height="40" rx="8" fill="#fff" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="110" y="165" text-anchor="middle" fill="#1e293b" font-size="12">Batch Sources</text>

  <rect x="42" y="210" width="136" height="40" rx="8" fill="#fff" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="110" y="235" text-anchor="middle" fill="#1e293b" font-size="12">Streaming Sources</text>

  <rect x="42" y="280" width="136" height="40" rx="8" fill="#fff" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="110" y="305" text-anchor="middle" fill="#1e293b" font-size="12">API / Files</text>

  <!-- Raw Zone Components -->
  <rect x="222" y="140" width="136" height="40" rx="8" fill="#fff" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="290" y="165" text-anchor="middle" fill="#1e293b" font-size="12">Landing Storage</text>

  <rect x="222" y="210" width="136" height="40" rx="8" fill="#fff" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="290" y="235" text-anchor="middle" fill="#1e293b" font-size="12">Raw Object Store</text>

  <rect x="222" y="280" width="136" height="40" rx="8" fill="#fff" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="290" y="305" text-anchor="middle" fill="#1e293b" font-size="12">Schema Registry</text>

  <!-- Curated Zone -->
  <rect x="402" y="140" width="136" height="40" rx="8" fill="#fff" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="470" y="165" text-anchor="middle" fill="#1e293b" font-size="12">Transform Engine</text>

  <rect x="402" y="210" width="136" height="40" rx="8" fill="#fff" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="470" y="235" text-anchor="middle" fill="#1e293b" font-size="12">Curated Store</text>

  <rect x="402" y="280" width="136" height="40" rx="8" fill="#fff" stroke="#0F6E56" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="470" y="305" text-anchor="middle" fill="#1e293b" font-size="12">Data Catalog</text>

  <!-- Consumption Zone -->
  <rect x="582" y="140" width="136" height="40" rx="8" fill="#fff" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="650" y="165" text-anchor="middle" fill="#1e293b" font-size="12">Data Warehouse</text>

  <rect x="582" y="210" width="136" height="40" rx="8" fill="#fff" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="650" y="235" text-anchor="middle" fill="#1e293b" font-size="12">Analytics / BI</text>

  <rect x="582" y="280" width="136" height="40" rx="8" fill="#fff" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="650" y="305" text-anchor="middle" fill="#1e293b" font-size="12">ML / AI Platform</text>

  <!-- Governance Components -->
  <rect x="762" y="140" width="106" height="40" rx="8" fill="#fff" stroke="#BA7517" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="815" y="165" text-anchor="middle" fill="#1e293b" font-size="11">Data Quality</text>

  <rect x="762" y="210" width="106" height="40" rx="8" fill="#fff" stroke="#BA7517" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="815" y="235" text-anchor="middle" fill="#1e293b" font-size="11">Access Control</text>

  <rect x="762" y="280" width="106" height="40" rx="8" fill="#fff" stroke="#BA7517" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="815" y="305" text-anchor="middle" fill="#1e293b" font-size="11">Lineage Tracking</text>

  <rect x="762" y="350" width="106" height="40" rx="8" fill="#fff" stroke="#BA7517" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="815" y="375" text-anchor="middle" fill="#1e293b" font-size="11">Audit & Compliance</text>

  <!-- Arrows: Ingestion → Raw -->
  <line x1="178" y1="160" x2="220" y2="160" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>
  <line x1="178" y1="230" x2="220" y2="230" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>
  <line x1="178" y1="300" x2="220" y2="300" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>

  <!-- Arrows: Raw → Curated -->
  <line x1="358" y1="160" x2="400" y2="160" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>
  <line x1="358" y1="230" x2="400" y2="230" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>
  <line x1="358" y1="300" x2="400" y2="300" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>

  <!-- Arrows: Curated → Consumption -->
  <line x1="538" y1="160" x2="580" y2="160" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>
  <line x1="538" y1="230" x2="580" y2="230" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>
  <line x1="538" y1="300" x2="580" y2="300" stroke="#1B3A6B" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>

  <!-- Governance vertical span line -->
  <line x1="815" y1="390" x2="815" y2="420" stroke="#BA7517" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,2"/>

  <!-- Footer -->
  <rect y="560" width="900" height="40" fill="#1B3A6B"/>
  <text x="450" y="584" text-anchor="middle" fill="#93b4d8" font-size="11">McCain Foods · Data Lake Architecture · Tier 2 Logical Pattern</text>
</svg>
